nasb.text: As for you, lift up your staff and stretch out your hand over the sea and divide it, and the sons of Israel shall go through the midst of the sea on dry land.

esv.text: Lift up your staff, and stretch out your hand over the sea and divide it, that the people of Israel may go through the sea on dry ground.

cnv.text: 你要把你的杖舉起來，向海伸手，把海分開，叫以色列人下到海中走乾地。

ccb.text: 你举手向海伸出手杖，把海水分开，以色列人可以从中间的干地走过去。
